zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Tourney於1444年出生在英國肯特時，他的父親John Tourney21歲，母親Bennett De Honywood22歲。他於1465年與Alice De Brockhill在英國英格蘭賀特福爾蕾托 哈達哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1492年在英國肯特薩爾特武德享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: Tourney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Turney
meanings: habitational name from any of the places in northern France called Tournai-sur-Dive (Orne), Tournay-sur-Odon (Calvados), or Tourny (Eure), or occasionally from Tournai in Hainaut (Belgium).

perhaps occasionally an occupational name from Middle English tournei, turnai ‘lawyer’ (Anglo-Norman French tourné), or a nickname from Middle English tournei(en) ‘(to) joust, take part in a tournament’ (Old French torneier). Compare Turner .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Tourney was born in 1444, in Kent, England, his father, John Tourney, was 21 and his mother, Bennett De Honywood, was 22. He married Alice De Brockhill in 1465, in Little Hadham, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1492, in Saltwood, Kent, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Tourney est né en 1444, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Tourney, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Bennett De Honywood, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alice De Brockhill en 1465, à Little Hadham, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1492, à Saltwood, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Tourney 1444 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Tourney 21 und seine Mutter Bennett De Honywood 22. Er hat 1465 in Little Hadham, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Alice De Brockhill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1492 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Saltwood, Kent, England.

Lui sposato Alice De Brockhill nel 1465, nel Little Hadham, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1492, nel Saltwood, Kent, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Tourneyが1444年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父John Tourneyは21歳，母Bennett De Honywoodは22歳であった。1465年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアリットル ハドハムでAlice De Brockhillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1492年にイギリスケントサルトウッドで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Tourney(이)가 1444년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Tourney(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Bennett De Honywood(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 리틀 하드함에서 Alice De Brockhill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 영국 켄트 살트우드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Tourney nasceu em 1444, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Tourney, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Bennett De Honywood, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice De Brockhill em 1465, em Little Hadham, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Tourney родился в 1444 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John Tourney было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Bennett De Honywood, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice De Brockhill в 1465 г. в местности литл хадхам, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1492 г. в местности салтвуд, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.
